title: The Unexpected Confession
content: Emma and Noah had planned nothing more than dinner after work. As they finished dessert, Noah became unusually quiet. Emma asked if everything was alright, expecting him to talk about work or family. Instead, he admitted that he had fallen in love with her long ago but had hidden his feelings because he valued their friendship too much to risk losing it. Emma smiled before he could apologize for making things awkward. She confessed that she had been hoping he would say those words for months. The evening they expected to be ordinary became one neither of them would ever forget.
